title: arenaria stricta subsp. macra
intro: Arenaria stricta subsp. macra, also known as the mountain sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds that have been shown to have antibacterial and antiviral properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Arenaria stricta subsp. macra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health ailments.
